# ScrewFast

> An open-source Astro template for creating versatile landing pages, blogs, and documentation sites with Tailwind CSS and Preline UI.

## Core Documentation
- [README](./README_ORIGINAL_THEME.md): Project overview, setup instructions, and feature list
- [Astro Configuration](./astro.config.mjs): Astro setup, integrations, and build configuration
- [Package Dependencies](./package.json): Project dependencies, scripts, and metadata
- [SEO Constants](./src/data_files/constants.ts): Site metadata, SEO configuration, and Open Graph settings

## Key Source Files
- [Home Page](./src/pages/index.astro): Main landing page component
- [Main Layout](./src/layouts/MainLayout.astro): Base layout wrapping all pages
- [Components Directory](./src/components/): Reusable UI components (navbar, footer, widgets, etc.)
- [Content Config](./src/content.config.ts): Content collections configuration for blog, insights, and products

## Additional Resources
- [Content Collections](./content/): Markdown files for blog, insights, and products
- [Static Assets](./public/): Images, icons, and other static resources
- [Styles Directory](./src/styles/): CSS stylesheets and Tailwind configuration
- [Utilities](./src/utils/): Helper functions, navigation config, and TypeScript definitions
